title: Iran Ceasefire Holds After Attacks on UAE Ships
summary: A ceasefire in Iran is holding after attacks on UAE ships in the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns about regional stability.
charlotte_impact: Escalation in the Strait of Hormuz could disrupt global oil supplies and trigger wider international conflict.

title: Trump Seeks Payback in Tuesday's Republican Elections
summary: Donald Trump is seeking to influence Tuesday's elections by targeting Republicans who have opposed him.
charlotte_impact: Trump's continued influence highlights divisions within the Republican party and shapes future political alignments.

title: Trump Ballroom Project Funding in GOP Enforcement Bill
summary: Funding for Trump's ballroom project is included in a $72B GOP enforcement bill, sparking controversy.

title: Supreme Court Allows Louisiana Redistricting Map Redraw
summary: The Supreme Court has cleared the way for Louisiana to redraw its map in an ongoing redistricting fight.
charlotte_impact: Redistricting impacts representation and can significantly alter the political landscape.

title: Unexpected Snowfall in May Hits Several Cities
summary: Cities that waited for snow all winter are now experiencing several inches of snowfall in May.

title: Abortion Pill Rulings Cause Confusion
summary: Recent abortion pill rulings are causing whiplash and confusion regarding access and legality.

title: Man Wounded After Shooting at Secret Service Near Washington Monument

title: Manhunt for Special Forces Veteran Accused of Shooting Wife
summary: A manhunt is underway for a special forces veteran with survival training accused of shooting his wife.
